content: Vintage cohort matrices sourced from 50+ Excel files with inconsistent column layouts. Column offset bug (labels in col 1 not col 0) required fix in prepare_tamara_data.py.
HSBC investor report PDFs parsed via pdfplumber — trigger values extracted from text with substring matching. Parsing is fragile; some reports have inconsistent formatting.
Demographics data pivoted from AE+SA side-by-side format to per-country dimension extraction. 5 dimensions: gender, nationality, age, income, account_age with 26 records total.
UAE data parsed from same data room as KSA but with fewer source files. Some vintage cohorts may have limited depth due to shorter operating history in UAE market.
